Title: ALTER TABLE SET READ WRITE
Description: Restore access of a table to allow inserts, updates, deletes and reads
See also: ALTER TABLE SET READ ONLY , ALTER TABLE SET INSERT ONLY .
Associated system table: sys.tables where type in (0, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7).
Examples:
ALTER TABLE [ IF EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
SET READ WRITE
